sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39157" key="e)piderkto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδερκτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n39157.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be seen, visible</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:2:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
